member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseIllegalFileNameChangeException
member.summary: Attempt to change the name or number of an existing database file
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3082 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if a schema maintenance operation, usually a schema load, attempts to rename or renumber an existing deployed database file. This operation is not allowed, as it could result in loss of access to data. The most-common cause of this problem is a mismatch in the map file definitions between the user schema and the database control file.
This problem is likely to occur only when deploying new user schema files or loading a schema that has incompatible map file definitions.
Action
Ensure that map file definitions that are being replaced or modified in the operation that triggered this error are compatible with the existing definitions in the database control file.
You can use the JOOB Database utility to obtain a list of the file name to number maps defined in the database control file, by selecting any of the common file-based operations. File names and numbers are listed in the list box for file selection.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseWrongLogFileVersionException
member.summary: Transaction journal is not the correct edition
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3097 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs during recovery from online or offline backup if the transaction journal does not contain certain control records required for the particular type of recovery being performed.
This occurs if a version of the transaction journal that was retained prior to the backup being performed is erroneously used as the latest version for use in recovery of an online backup or roll-forward recovery from an offline database backup.
Action
Restore the correct version of the transaction journal and re-initiate backup or roll-forward recovery.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseBackupInvalidException
member.summary: Database state not valid for roll-forward recovery
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3102 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when the database determines a roll-forward recovery cannot be permitted because the database state is inconsistent with a restored offline backup.
Action
Refer to your JOOB messages log file ( jommsg.log), where the reason the utility recover request was rejected is logged.
The following message is logged when a roll-forward recovery is attempted with an online backup.
Roll-Forward Recovery Error: cannot session an online backup
In this case, you must use the JOOB Database utility Restore command to session an online backup.
The following message is logged when a roll-forward recovery is attempted with a database image that is not in a closed state.
Roll-Forward Recovery Error: database requires Restart Recovery
A backup containing a database image that is not in a closed state can occur if:
You attempt to copy the files when the database is in a crashed and non-recovered state. The JOOB Database utility touchDB command is provided to open and close the database and ensure it is not in a recovery state. Restart recovery is performed when the database is opened, if required. If the state of the database is unknown when the backup is to be performed, you should execute the touchDB command prior to copying the files.
There are third-party backup tools copying files while the database is open. The database opens files in exclusive mode to prohibit external access to the files. However, some third-party backup tools utilize privileged operating system functions to access and copy the file data. Database files copied in such a manner form an inconsistent database image and are invalid for any purpose.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseSystemResourceException
member.summary: Insufficient system resources
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3111 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when the operating system refuses service to the database due to constrained resources.
Action
Refer to your JOOB messages log file ( jommsg.log)log file for the value of the operating system error code. It is possible that the system is under-configured for the applied workload.
If you consider the operating environment to be sound with adequate memory resources, you should refer the problem to your operating system vendor, as there may be a resolution available in a service pack. There have been instances where operating system bugs have caused such errors.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseAuditSizeException
member.summary: Database transaction audit file has exceeded maximum size
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3112 from JOM.
Cause
This error is raised when an audit record is written to the current database journal at an offset larger than 3G bytes. If this happens, the server is shut down to ensure that the database remains in a recoverable state. However, a switch to a new journal file should occur long before the current journal reaches this size.
The journal switch mechanism could be blocked for a number of reasons. A common operationally induced cause is insufficient disk space, which can be verified by examining entries in the JOOB messages log file ( jommsg.log).
Action
If lack of disk space is the cause, ensure that sufficient space is always available for the creation of database journal files; otherwise, if your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support, providing the JOOB messages log file together with the dump file that was created when the server shut down.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseRecoveryException
member.summary: Database recovery not possible - fatal error encountered
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3113 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when database restart recovery encounters a fatal error and cannot continue.
The most-likely cause of this error is that one or more database files have been corrupted. The JOOB messages log file ( jommsg.log) contains further details about the error, including the name of the file being recovered and the transaction recovery record that was being sessioned when the error was detected.
Action
Restore the database from backup and then perform a roll-forward recovery to reapply transactions completed since the backup. Ensure that you ascertain and eliminate the root cause of the problem, especially if it is hardware-related, to avoid a recurrence of the error.
If your JOOB licenses include support and you need assistance with recovering your database, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseChecksumException
member.summary: Checksum mismatch in fetched data
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3114 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when the checksum calculation performed on a record fetched from disk does not match the checksum that was computed and stored with the record when it was written to disk.
A checksum mismatch means that the record was only partially written to disk or the record has been corrupted for some other reason. (For details, see "Data Corruption", in Chapter 3 of your JOOB Database Administration Guide.)
Action
Restore the database from backup and then perform a roll-forward recovery to reapply transactions completed since the backup. Ensure that you ascertain and eliminate the root cause of the problem, especially if it is hardware related, to avoid a recurrence.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseRequestBufferTooSmallException
member.summary: GetObject request buffer too small
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3115 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when there is a mismatch between the class definitions loaded into memory and the actual definitions in the database. It can also indicate an internal error due to character conversion issues between nodes.
Action
If the schema was changed around the time that the exception occurred, stop and restart the node on which it occurred. This refreshes class definitions loaded into memory. In these circumstances, the exception is similar to the 3039 - Schema Database object size mismatch exception.
If your JOOB licenses include support and the issue is not resolved by stopping and restarting the node, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseFileNotDefinedException
member.summary: The database file is not defined in the control file
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3120 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if a database request attempts to access a file by a number that is not defined in the database control file. It means that a database file is defined in the schema but not in the database control file, so a mismatch normally occurs only as a result of an operational error where the ability to detect this mismatch via timestamp checking has been subverted by using the JOOB Database utility reset timestamp operation, or similar. (See "Resetting Timestamps", in Chapter 3 of your JOOB Database Administration Guide.)
Action
Investigate the steps that lead to this mismatch and take corrective action, if possible. If corrective action is not possible, a restore to a database that is known to be in a self-consistent state will be necessary.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseFileNotCreatedException
member.summary: The database file or file partition is not created
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3121 from JOM.
Cause
This error is raised by database file operations when the database file has been deleted or it is defined but not yet created. An exception with this error code is of concern only if the file was previously created and is expected to exist.
Action
Database administration or backup applications should handle this error with an appropriate exception handler tailored to site requirements. The JOOB sample backup application in RootSchema reports all files that are defined but not yet created at the end of the backup session.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseAccessDisabledException
member.summary: Access to objects in this secondary database is currently disabled
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3123 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when an inquiry application that is executing on a secondary database system attempts to access persistent non-system objects when read-access to the database is disabled.
Action
Inquiry applications running on a secondary database should arm an exception handler to handle this error. JOOB system administrators may want to avoid occurrences of this error by ensuring that inquiry users and applications are not using the system when read-access is disabled.

member.summary: Backup is incomplete or backupinfo corrupted
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3124 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if an attempt is made to restore an incomplete database backup. It is also possible that the backupinfo file is corrupted. In either case, the database backup is unusable.
Action
Find and restore a complete and checked database backup.

member.summary: A required transaction journal was not found
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3125 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when a transaction journal required for a database recovery or secondary database replay operation was not found. The path name of the missing journal is recorded in the JOOB messages ( jommsg.log) log file.
Action
Locate and restore the missing journal and repeat the failed operation.

member.summary: Roll-forward terminate journal value is invalid
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3126 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when a roll-forward is attempted with an end journal number less than the required start journal for the database backup as stored in the control file. The recovery is terminated with this error.
Action
Re-issue the roll-forward request with a corrected termination end journal number.

member.summary: Licensed database size exceeded
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3128 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if a database operation attempts to open or extend a database file and the total size of user data files open at the time exceeds the maximum size allowed by the terms of your license agreement.
Action
Avoid exceeding the database size restriction or purchase a license without size restrictions. Refer to your license agreement for further details.

member.summary: Database control file does not require upgrade
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3129 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if an attempt is made to convert the control file (that is, _control.dat) using the batch JOOB Database utility jdbutilb executable when the control file does not require conversion. (The database code version is updated when the database is closed after it has been used, rather than when the control file is converted.)
Action
None.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseClassVersionMismatchException
member.summary: Class version of journal record does not match requested version
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3131 from JOM.
Cause
This error is raised by the JadeAuditAccess class getBeforeImage and getAfterImage methods when the mapped class version number is not zero and it does not match the class version number of the object in the audited update record.
Action
Reload the schema definition in the analyzing system so that it matches the definition of the system that generated the journals. Load a class number map file that was created on the generating system containing the correct version information.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseInBackupStateException
member.summary: Cannot perform this operation when in backup state
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3156 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs when the database receives a file operation request that cannot be performed because the database is in backup state; that is, an online backup is in progress. Operations that can raise this exception include file or partition removal, moving a partition, marking a partition as absent, and changing the location of a partition.
Action
Defer the operation until the online backup is completed.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseFileOfflineException
member.summary: Cannot access an offline database file
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3162 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if application logic attempts to create, update, or delete an object in a database file that has been marked offline. It can also occur if a file operation is attempted on an offline file that requires the file to be online; for example, a file reorganization, compact, or certify operation.
Action
If the file is required for an administrative task, the offline file should be restored and marked online.

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.JoobDatabaseFileNotBackedUpException
member.summary: File not backed up
member.remarks:
Represents error number 3173 from JOM.
Cause
This error occurs if:
The file or partition is not backed up in the specified location when using the restoreFile or restorePartitionFile command.
An error condition is detected when copying the file or partition information from the base backupinfo file using the makeBackupInfo command of the batch JOOB Database Utility program.
When a file or partition is not backed up in a delta, the file cannot have been modified between the base backup and the delta backup. When modification is detected, the 3173 error occurs because the file or partition should have been backed up. Current and base backupinfo file update timestamps must match and the single Unstructured Data Resource (UDR) file lists must match.
Action
For more-specific information, see the JOOB messages ( jommsg.log) log file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N00099Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check your usage of non-JOOB code to ensure that the user is not copying more data into a JOOB-supplied buffer than the allocated size of the buffer. For example, an external function call may be given a binaryBuffer[30] and the external function expected a larger buffer and copied 40 bytes into the buffer, causing the overrun..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N00099Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if data copied to an internal buffer copies past the end of the allocated space..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N00099Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Over ran a buffer, memory has been corrupted.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N00100Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Shut down one or more applications to regain memory, and then retry the request. If this problem persists, it may be necessary to add additional physical memory or reduce the cache size limits. For details, see the TransientCacheSizeLimit parameter in the [Client] or [Server] section of your JOOB initialization file, or the ObjectCacheSizeLimit parameter in the [PersistentDb] section. See also your JOOB Initialization File Reference..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N00100Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a memory allocation request fails..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N00100Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A memory allocation request failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N01251Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your application code to solve both stack overflow problems. (For details, see error 1201 – Kernel stack overflow.).

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N01251Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if JOOB detects a stack overflow condition. JOOB initially raises exception 1201 – Kernel stack overflow, during which the corresponding exception handler or handlers are invoked. However, during the process of the original exception, the stack continued to grow to more than 20 call levels. This is a fatal error that causes JOOB to terminate..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_N01251Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A stack overflow exception handler exceeded 20 call levels.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P00004Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine why an invalid object reference is being used in this situation and then correct the logic to avoid the error, or code and arm an exception handler to handle the error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P00004Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when your application logic attempts to access an object and the referenced object does not exist. The most common situation in which this error occurs is when application logic accesses a feature of an object (for example, a method or property) using a reference to an object that existed when the reference was first obtained (for example, from a collection) and has since been deleted by a concurrent transaction. A reference to a deleted object is deemed to be invalid..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P00008Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when the object identifier (oid) of an object has been corrupted. The object identifier contains the instance identifier, which is used to access the record in the database for that object. If this instance identifier is corrupted, a subsequent attempt to read the record based on this instance identifier could return this error or an incorrect record. This error can also be returned if your application code attempts to access a deleted object..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01018Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Increase the size of your cache to allocate more memory for caching database objects. For details, see the TransientCacheSizeLimit parameter in the [Server] or [Client] section of your JOOB initialization file, or the ObjectCacheSizeLimit parameter in the [PersistentDb] section. For details, see your JOOB Initialization File Reference. Alternatively, correct the cache setting if it is too large, or close some other applications to free up memory..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01018Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error often occurs if a cache setting is too small (for example, when you attempt to load a large image file). When a process needs to place an object in the transient cache and the cache is full, objects must be swapped out of the cache to make room. If the process currently has the most amount of cache allocated to it, it swaps out its own objects. If not, one of the other processes is requested to swap out its objects. Because there may be a delay before this process swaps out its objects, [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01018Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No memory for buffers.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01019Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01019Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when the schema information cannot be loaded into memory. When the JOOB initialize routine is called, the schema information is loaded into memory. This error is sent to your application when this schema cannot be loaded..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01019Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot load schema.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01020Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Rationalize your class hierarchy to reduce the number of classes..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01020Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you attempt to exceed the limit on the number of classes. JOOB currently allows a maximum of 16,383 classes, including system classes. The maximum number of user classes is 12,953. Any attempt to exceed this limit returns this error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01020Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Too many classes.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01021Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Redefine the property definition to the correct class, or fix the portion of code that resulted in the error in your application program. For details, see “Assignment Compatibility” under “JOOB Language Reference”, in Chapter 1 of your JOOB Developer's Reference..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01021Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you attempt to assign an object reference to a property and the class of the reference is not compatible with the defined type of the property..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01021Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid class for property.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01022Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Redefine the collection definition to the correct class, or change the application code that resulted in this error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01022Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to place an object in a collection that is not an instance of the class, or any of its subclasses, stored by the collection. Objects that can be put in collections must be defined in the schema, by specifying the class of objects that the collection can hold..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01022Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Class is incompatible with collection membership.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01023Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Redefine the dictionary definition to the correct class, or change the application code that resulted in this error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01023Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to use a key in a dictionary that is not an instance of the class, or any of its subclasses, used as a key in the dictionary. Objects that can act as keys in a dictionary must be defined in the schema, by specifying the class of keys that the dictionary can use..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01023Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid class for key.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01086Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine why an object reference of the wrong type is being used in this context, and correct the code that led to the error. The method and source position containing the expression at which the exception was raised are reported in the error description. For further details about type cast expression, see Chapter 1 of your JOOB Developer’s Reference..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01086Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an object reference in a guarded expression is not of the type asserted by the type cast. For example, in the JOOB language expression object.Automobile, if object is not a member of the class of Automobile (that is, it is not of type Automobile), this error would occur when the expression is evaluated..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01086Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Class of object is invalid in this context.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01088Action

If it is necessary to manually update the reference, change the options for the references in the joml file to manauto..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01088Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt is made to manually update a reference that is defined as being automatic. Automatic references are maintained by JOOB and cannot be updated manually..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Context error.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01090Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine why a null object reference is being used in this situation and then correct the code that led to the error. It may be that the object must be created, or you may have to change your code to ensure that the object reference is set to a value other than null. The method and source position containing the expression at which the exception was raised are reported in the error description..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01090Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to use a null object reference in a JOOB language or JOOB Object Manager operation. It may be that the referenced class has been defined but no instances of that class exist. The most common situation in which this occurs is when your code accesses a feature of an object (for example, a method or a property) by means of an object reference that has a null value. The reference can be thought of as a pointer or pathway for the operation. JOOB cannot proceed [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01090Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempted access via null object reference.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01091Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Perform one of the following actions, as appropriate. Change your application code to store only binary items of the correct length. Update the schema to increase the size of the binary item that can be stored in this property..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01092Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs during an exception handling operation when your application code attempts to access the object that caused the error. member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01092Text

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01097Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Remove the subobject properties from the collection class, or make the reference to the collection a shared reference rather than an exclusive reference..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01097Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt is made to access a property on an exclusive collection where the property is a subobject. This operation is not allowed. This error is most commonly caused if you add a subobject property (for example slob, blob, or another collection) to one of your collection classes and then define an exclusive reference to this collection on another class. By making the reference exclusive, it becomes a subobject reference. Any attempt to use the subobjects on the collection from this [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01097Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Exclusive collections cannot have subobject properties.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01099Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to For each component of the key path (except for the first), ensure that the class on which it is defined has at least one inverse to the prior component in the key path. If this is not possible, you cannot use a key path in this case..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01099Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you have defined a key path that has a component that does not have an inverse to its prior component. When a collection with key paths participates in a relationship (that is, a reference of the collection type is used as an inverse), the following applies. Except for the first component in a key path, each class on which every subsequent component is defined must have at least one property that is an inverse to the previous component in the key path. If this is not the case, an [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01099Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Key path component does not have an inverse to its prior component: refer to jommsg.log.

Lock contention information is recorded on the database server node. The information recorded includes [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01140Cause

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01146Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an object is updated before the upgrade lock is completed. When the lock on a collection is upgraded from shared to update (for example, when the collection is iterated then updated while in transaction state), the object is unlocked before the update lock is requested, which allows another process to update the collection. This exception is continuable..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when your application code attempts to call a new method and it has already reached the maximum number of embedded method call levels (which is currently 256). One cause can be recursive method calls with no clear exit conditions. In addition, this error occurs when a method is invoked with a short timer event that performs a doWindowEvents method call. If the processing takes too long, the doWindowEvents event method processes the next timer event, eventually resulting in a stack ove [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your application code to avoid a duplicated relationship reference. In relation to the above example, you should consider the following coding changes. If an employee can have multiple departments, the dept property of Employee should be changed to a collection, allDepartments, and the relationship between Department and Employee should be changed to many-to-many. This then allows a single Employee object to be referenced by multiple Department objects. If an employee cannot have mult [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01210Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if JOOB encounters a duplicate relationship reference. An example of this error follows. Consider the following sequence. 1. There are two classes: Department and Employee. 2. Each Department has a collection, allEmployees, of all of its employees. 3. Each Employee has a reference, dept, to their department. 4. An inverse reference is defined between dept and allEmployees, so that one department has many employees and a single employee has only one department. Both p [rest of string was truncated]";.

If an error occurs during an automatic update, JOOB must abort the transaction. If your exception handler does not abort the transaction, JOOB does so automatically when the stack unwinds after handling the error. member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The possible actions that you could take are as follows. Write an exception handler that retries the operation or aborts the action. member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if there is an attempt to update a non-environmental object on a secondary database. The secondary database server maintains a secondary copy of the database synchronized with a primary updating copy and supports read-only access only. Application programs cannot update a secondary database. The following environmental objects can be updated. process node system An attempt to update any other object on the secondary database causes this exception to be raised..

Otherwise, restart the SDS secondary database..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01302Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check that the class definition of the collection that is referenced is complete; for example, if it is a dictionary, check that its keys are correctly defined. If JOOB allows you to define a collection with an incomplete or inconsistent description, this is a fault in the JOOB software and should be reported. If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01302Cause

When a Collection class is first opened, the collection, along with the JOOB Object Manager, analyzes its collection description defined in the schema. If this description is incomplete or inconsistent, a 1302 error occurs..

Note Array entries can be removed or added automatically by the JOOB Object Manager if the array is an automatic inverse property..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01309Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you attempt to add an object to a set and the object already exists in the set, or to a dictionary when an entry with the same key and object identifier (oid) already exists in the dictionary. Duplicate objects are not allowed in an automatically maintained member key dictionary, even if the dictionary allows duplicate keys. It is possible to add the same object more than once to a manually maintained dictionary if the object is added with different keys..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01309Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Object already added to this set or dictionary.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01310Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine why a duplicated key is being added to the dictionary and correct the code that led to the error. The method and source position containing the expression at which the exception was raised are reported in the error description..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01310Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to add a duplicated key entry to a dictionary that specifies duplicate keys are not allowed..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01310Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Key already used in this dictionary.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01311Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine why a null object reference is being passed and correct the code that led to the error. The method and source position containing the expression at which the exception was raised are reported in the error description..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01311Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a null object reference is passed to a Collection class method (such as Add or Remove)..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01311Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Null object reference cannot be passed as a value argument to a collection method.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01312Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine why the class is not assignment-compatible and correct the code that led to the error. The method and source position containing the expression at which the exception was raised are reported in the error description..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01312Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the class of an object reference passed to a Collection class method (for example, Add or Remove) is not assignment-compatible with the defined membership of the collection..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01312Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Class of value passed to a collection method incompatible with membership.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01313Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Remove any code that attempts to iterate a virtual collection in reverse order. Check everywhere that you use the back method of the Iterator class or the reversed option with the foreach instruction..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01313Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to iterate a virtual collection in reverse order. The order in which instances are returned when iterating a virtual collection is not significant, and iterating backwards is not supported..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01313Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot iterate a virtual collection backwards.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01314Action

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01314Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to retrieve a key from a dictionary and the ordinal parameter is out of range. You can use the getCurrentKey method of the Iterator class to retrieve keys from the dictionary while iterating through the dictionary. However, the value applied as the ordinal position is out of range..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01314Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The ordinal position of the requested key is out of range.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01315Action

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01315Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an operation that is adding a new entry to a collection causes a new collection block to be created and the class mapping in the object identifier (oid) for this new block does not match the class map in the oid of the collections root block. This error would normally occur only with root schema collections that have at some time been created by a system user and are now being modified by a non-system user..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01322Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ensure that the total concatenated key size is less than or equal to the documented limit of 512 character units. Note The limit of 512 character units applies to the total concatenated length of the dictionary key. For example, in practice a single binary key is restricted to exactly 512 octets in an ANSI build and 1024 octets in a Unicode build, since in the Windows UTF16 encoding a character unit is two octets in length. If you have multiple keys of different length, the limit is still precisely 512 [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01322Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is raised by the dynamic dictionary addMemberKey method or addExternalKey method if the total size of your keys when concatenated exceeds the dictionary limit of 512 character units..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01327Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is raised by dynamic dictionary methods when the definition of the dictionary is attempted across nodes. Once the definition of the keys has begun, the dynamic dictionary is in a state that is unfit for processing on another node. Definition commences with the initial setMembership call but can recommence with a clearKeys call or another setMembership call (which performs an implicit clearKeys), and these calls could be performed on another node. Definition on a node is completed with an endKeys [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01328Cause

For example, if you create an iterator in a server method executing on an IBM RS/6000 server and you then attempt to use the iterator on a client or application server executing on an Intel platform, this error is raised..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01328Text

When you attempt to retrieve part of the contents of a JoobBytes object by using the GetData method or update part of the contents using the PutData method, the value of the: offset parameter must be zero through the allocated length offset parameter and the length parameter combined must not exceed the length of the current content.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01700Text

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01701Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check that you have correctly entered your user id and password. Alternatively, obtain a valid user id and password from your security administrator..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01701Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your user identification (user id) or password fails the security check. As the user validation support feature is in place, every user must have a valid user id and password in order to access the system..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01701Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User id or password is invalid.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01702Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Report this error to your security administrator..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01702Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your node expects encrypted messages but receives a message that is not encrypted. As the network message encryption feature is in place, incoming request or response Remote Procedure Call (RPC) messages must be encrypted. The RPC protocols always check the encrypted message flag in the header against the enabled or disabled state of the encryption feature..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01702Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Encryption enabled, but non encrypted RPC message received.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01703Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Report this error to your security administrator..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01703Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you receive an encrypted message but your node is not set up to handle encrypted messages. As the network message encryption routine is not in place, incoming request or response Remote Procedure Call (RPC) messages that are encrypted are rejected..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01703Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Encryption not enabled, but encrypted RPC message received.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01704Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Report this error to your security administrator..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01704Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a message fails the Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC). After the site decryption routine is called, a CRC is generated against the data part of the message and compared to the CRC in the header. A CRC mismatch results in the message being rejected. As part of the network message encryption feature, the CRC provides protection against loss of data if something goes wrong in the encryption or decryption routines; for example, different or incompatible algorithms being used at each end. If t [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01704Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cyclic redundancy check on encrypted message failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01705Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Report this error to your security administrator..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01705Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you have the authentication feature in place but it fails to initialize. This could be due to the failure of the dynamic load of the authentication library or to the failure of any of the entry points. If the dynamic load fails on a remote access capable node, an exception is logged in your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) and remote access provider support is disabled, preventing any clients from connecting..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P01705Text

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Report this to your security administrator..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you have the network message encryption feature in place but it fails to initialize. This could be due to the failure of the dynamic load of the library or to the failure of any of the entry points. If the dynamic load fails on a remote access capable node, an exception is logged in your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) and remote access provider support is disabled, preventing any clients from connecting..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03003Cause

The maximum number of processes (each of which requires a transient database file) that can be started in a node is determined [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03013Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Certify the affected database file to ensure that there are no serious errors. If there are no errors in the object records, a file compaction restores the integrity of the freespace index. For details about running the certify and compaction routines, see “The JOOB Database Utility”, in Chapter 1 of your JOOB Database Administration Guide..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to To avoid this error in an SDS administration application, arm an exception handler to deal with the possibility of this error being raised. Most query-related administration methods can be called while a database is changing roles, while most commands result in this error. To avoid this error in user applications, shut down updating applications running the primary system before initiating the takeover operation or arm an exception handler to deal with the error. Note that updating applications ru [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03015Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when a Synchronized Database Service (SDS) administration method of the JadeDatabaseAdmin class is invoked and a database role change (or takeover operation) is in progress. This error can also be returned if a user process running on a primary system attempts to initiate a persistent transaction while a role change is in progress..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03016Text

See also your JOOB Initialization File Reference.).

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If the error occurs in the persistent database, the only way to correct the problem is to undo the action that resulted in the error. This may involve restoring schema files or both schema and data files from a backup. You can use the JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) to determine the object identifier (oid) of the instance that has a size mismatch. The log shows the size discrepancy and you can determine the class number from the oid. The class number and size mismatch should provide an indication o [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03039Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the size of an object buffer that is passed in a JOOB Object Manager request does not match the size of the object that is stored in the database. This error normally means that there is a mismatch between the schema definition of an object and the physical representation of that object on disk. For example, this error can occur if the definition of a class changes when properties are added or removed, but the required class versioning and reorganization does not result in the nece [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03039Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Schema to Database object size mismatch.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03040Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Restore the database from backup..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03040Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the database was previously opened in NO-AUDIT mode, and terminated abnormally before all updates were committed. It is not safe to use the database, because updates will not have been audited, and therefore the database is most likely in an inconsistent state and is not recoverable..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03040Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database is locked due to crash while not audited.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03041Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Use the information contained in your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) to determine the cause of the failure and then take corrective action. The logged information includes the path name of the control file and the actual error that was encountered..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03041Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an error is encountered while accessing the database control file. This can be due to a security or accessibility problem (for example, if another process is accessing the file), the file becoming corrupted, or the device containing the file encountering read or write errors..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03041Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error accessing the Database control file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03042Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check that the current user has delete privileges for the file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03042Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a temporary file cannot be deleted. The database creates temporary files during the file reorganization, compaction, or rebuild process..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03042Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unable to delete file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03043Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check that a file with the new file name does not already exist in the relevant directory and that there is sufficient disk space for the renamed file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03043Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you try to rename a temporary file. The database creates temporary files during file reorganization, compaction, or rebuild process..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03043Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unable to rename file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03044Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The backup file should exist in the database directory. Locate the file, and restore it to this directory..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03044Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unable to find backup file (.BAK).

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Correct the database file definition in your schema..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to the jomreorg.log file located in the directory identified by the TEMP environment variable or in the current directory if no TEMP environment variable is defined. In a multi user JOOB environment, errors are output to one of two log files. Local errors are output to the jomreorg.log file located in the directory identified by the TEMP environment variable or the current directory if no TEMP environment variable is defined. Errors on the remote (server) node are output to the jomreorg.log fil [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03046Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a file reorganization operation encounters an unexpected error in the database..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to File reorganization terminated due to error.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03047Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Retry the operation. The database restores the file from backup before commencing the interrupted reorganization..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03047Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a database file reorganization fails to complete when the database is restarted and the file is reopened..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03047Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A prior file reorganization was prematurely interrupted.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03048Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03048Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the edition of a requested object is greater than the current edition of the object. This is generally an indication of a problem in the cache coherency protocols between client and server nodes..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03048Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Object edition invalid.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03049Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03049Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the edition of a requested object is lesser than the current edition of the object. This indicates that the object has been updated by another process. This error is normally handled internally by the JOOB Object Manager and is employed as a mechanism to synchronize editions of binary large objects (blobs)..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03049Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Object edition out of date.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03050Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to the rebuild.log file in the database directory for a description of the error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03050Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a file rebuild operation encounters an unexpected error in the database..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03050Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Errors encountered rebuilding file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03051Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to None..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change the file names to comply with file system constraints, or use a file system that supports the file names you want to use..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03053Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a database file or directory name that is defined in the schema is not supported by the file system that hosts the file. For example, if the file is supported by a Novell file server and the path name contains non-ANSI Unicode characters, it may not be supported. If you are using long file names on a Novell file server, the OS/2 namespace option must be enabled..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03053Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database File name not valid for file system.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03054Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the JOOB Object Manager attempts to access a file number outside of the valid range of currently defined database files..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot access invalid file number.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database already initialized.

If this does not provide a solution, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support if your JOOB licenses include support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03056Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the operating system encounters an error when closing a database file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03056Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error encountered closing database file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03057Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) contains the timestamp found in the database and the expected timestamp found in the control file. If the wrong control file is present, you must restore the correct control file from backup. If the correct control file cannot be located, you must restore the entire database from backup and then perform a roll-forward recovery to reapply committed transactions applied since the backup..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03057Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the database file timestamp does not match the control file timestamp..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03057Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database file timestamp does not match control file.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an internal fault is detected while initializing the JOOB database engine..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database engine failed to start.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait until the reorganization has completed and then retry the operation..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03060Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03060Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error can occur during routine operation and is normally handled internally by the JOOB database module. If the error is not handled and it is encountered by your application, it is an indication of an internal software fault..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03060Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database read past the current end of file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03062Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) for a description of the error reported and then take the appropriate action. If this does not provide a solution, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support if your JOOB licenses include support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03062Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is raised by the operating system if an error is found on the last database read or write operation. This can occur for several reasons; for example, a hardware device error, file corruption, a security issue, or a software problem..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03062Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unexpected I/O error encountered accessing database file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03063Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03063Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a file operation (for example, opening a file during database recovery) fails to locate a valid entry in the control file for the file. If this error occurs, the control file is corrupted or it has not been properly maintained by the database..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03063Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database file control record was not found.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03064Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03064Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is used internally by the database during recovery to avoid disk reads when not required. Although the error should never be seen, if it does occur, it is an indication of an internal software fault..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03064Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Object record not resident in cache.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03065Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If this error results in a failure in database recovery, the database must be restored from backup. If the problem occurred during a system crash recovery, it may still be possible to perform an archival recovery by using the last backup and recovering through the transaction journals up to the point where the journals become invalid. If you require assistance and your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03065Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a record in the transaction journal is out of sequence or corrupted. The header of each journal record contains an integral sequence number and a timestamp. The sequence number in each journal record must be exactly one higher than the number in its predecessor, and the timestamp must be valid and greater than or equal to its predecessor..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03065Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Record sequence exception in transaction journal.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03067Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03067Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if internal database logic encounters an invalid or undefined database role..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03067Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid database role.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03068Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is likely to occur only if you have upgraded a JOOB database to a new release and then restored earlier versions of your binaries and database files while retaining a transaction journal created in the new format. To avoid this problem, ensure that all database files, including transaction journals, are kept synchronized. It is safe to remove an incorrect transaction journal when the database does not require recovery. In this case, the database switches to the next journal in sequence..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03068Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when you attempt to open a database and the format of the latest transaction journal is incompatible with the version of JOOB software being used..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03068Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Transaction journal format not supported.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03069Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03069Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error indicates an internal software state error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03069Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The Database Reorg Manager is still active.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03071Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Use the existing database file, or create a new file with a different name..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03071Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a database file already exists when you have requested the creation of a new file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03071Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to User disallowed replacing an existing database file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03072Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait until the database becomes available and then retry the operation..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03072Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if another user has the database locked in exclusive (single user) mode. Only one user at a time can open the database in exclusive mode..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03072Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database locked for exclusive access.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03073Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your site makes use of roll-forward recovery for production databases, you must ensure that a backup is taken following periods of usage in no-audit mode. If the error is encountered by a secondary database attempting to replay a non-replayable reorganization, the secondary database must be re-cloned..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03073Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you attempt roll-forward recovery while the database is open for no-audit usage. The error can also be returned by a secondary database attempting to replay a non-replayable reorganization. Database tracking on the secondary database halts when it encounters the audit discontinuity record..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03073Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Recovery across no audit usage is not possible.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03074Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Use the information contained in your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) to determine the cause of the failure and then take corrective action. The information that is logged includes the path name of the file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03074Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a required database file directory was not found..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03074Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database file directory was not found.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03076Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03076Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a JOOB Object Manager process attempts to update an object buffer that has been modified by a different process, and the transaction that updated the buffer has not yet committed. The JOOB Object Manager locking protocol should prevent this from occurring..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03076Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Illegal update of uncommitted object buffer.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03077Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Consider increasing the MaxWaitForQuietPoint parameter value so that it is sufficiently long to allow the longest transactions in the application to complete. You should also change your application code to handle this error when requesting a changeAccessMode of a DbFile to DB_READ_ONLY mode. When attempting a database takeover, ensure that all pending transactions are completed before retrying the operation. Note that large values for the MaxWaitForQuietPoint parameter could result in transaction [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03077Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an operation cannot complete because a database quiet point was not achieved within a specified timeout period. A database quiet point is a point in time when there are no database transactions in progress. When an operation requests a database quiet point and one or more database transactions are still in progress, new transactions are blocked at beginTransaction and the operation waits for MaxWaitForQuietPoint seconds for existing transactions to complete. If in-progress transa [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03077Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Maximum time to wait for quiet point was exceeded.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03078Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03078Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an internal error is encountered accessing a database Btree block..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03078Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unexpected error accessing btree.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03079Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait until the database backup is complete and then retry the operation..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03079Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an update operation is received by the database while it is locked for archival backup. A user has placed the database in archive or quiesced backup mode in order to temporarily suspend update operations while a database backup is taken..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03079Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database is locked for archive backup.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03080Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Correct the ReadOnlySchema setting in the [Server] or [Client] section of the JOOB initialization file to reflect the required mode of access..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03080Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a client node has requested read-only schema access but the server was not initialized in read-only schema mode..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03080Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database was not initialized in read only schema mode.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03081Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The operation can be safely retried. To report this fault if your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03081Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when a user process sends a request to the database while it is still processing a request for the same user..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03081Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A re-entrant call was made for the same database user.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03082Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ensure that map file definitions that are being replaced or modified in the operation that triggered this error are compatible with the existing definitions in the database control file. You can use the JOOB Database utility to obtain a list of the file name to number maps defined in the database control file, by selecting any of the common file-based operations. File names and numbers are listed in the list box for file selection..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03082Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a schema maintenance operation, usually a schema load, attempts to rename or renumber an existing deployed database file. This operation is not allowed, as it could result in loss of access to data. The most-common cause of this problem is a mismatch in the map file definitions between the user schema and the database control file. This problem is likely to occur only when deploying new user schema files or loading a schema that has incompatible map file definitions..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03082Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to change the name or number of an existing database file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03083Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Use the information recorded in your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) to determine the class of object being updated. You may need to avoid performing the operation that results in this error by performing it in some other way. In addition, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support if your JOOB licenses include support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03083Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you attempt to update a system object or to create a new system object in a system file that is read-only..
