member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03085Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error can occur when undoing a top-level Btree operation during a transaction abort. The error indicates that it is not possible to undo the operation given the current state of the Btree. This is a fatal error that results in termination of the database server to invoke restart recovery. If restart recovery encounters the same problem a 3113 – Database recovery not possible - fatal error encountered error occurs..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03085Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed to undo BTree operation - state is not done.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03111Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log)log file for the value of the operating system error code. It is possible that the system is under-configured for the applied workload. If you consider the operating environment to be sound with adequate memory resources, you should refer the problem to your operating system vendor, as there may be a resolution available in a service pack. There have been instances where operating system bugs have caused such errors..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03111Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when the operating system refuses service to the database due to constrained resources..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03111Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Insufficient system resources.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03112Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If lack of disk space is the cause, ensure that sufficient space is always available for the creation of database journal files; otherwise, if your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support, providing the JOOB messages log file together with the dump file that was created when the server shut down..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03112Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is raised when an audit record is written to the current database journal at an offset larger than 3G bytes. If this happens, the server is shut down to ensure that the database remains in a recoverable state. However, a switch to a new journal file should occur long before the current journal reaches this size. The journal switch mechanism could be blocked for a number of reasons. A common operationally induced cause is insufficient disk space, which can be verified by examining entries in the [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03112Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database transaction audit file has exceeded maximum size.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03113Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Restore the database from backup and then perform a roll-forward recovery to reapply transactions completed since the backup. Ensure that you ascertain and eliminate the root cause of the problem, especially if it is hardware-related, to avoid a recurrence of the error. If your JOOB licenses include support and you need assistance with recovering your database, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03113Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when database restart recovery encounters a fatal error and cannot continue. The most-likely cause of this error is that one or more database files have been corrupted. The JOOB messages log file (jommsg.log) contains further details about the error, including the name of the file being recovered and the transaction recovery record that was being processed when the error was detected..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03113Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database recovery not possible - fatal error encountered.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03114Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Restore the database from backup and then perform a roll-forward recovery to reapply transactions completed since the backup. Ensure that you ascertain and eliminate the root cause of the problem, especially if it is hardware related, to avoid a recurrence..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03114Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when the checksum calculation performed on a record fetched from disk does not match the checksum that was computed and stored with the record when it was written to disk. A checksum mismatch means that the record was only partially written to disk or the record has been corrupted for some other reason. (For details, see “Data Corruption”, in Chapter 3 of your JOOB Database Administration Guide.).

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03114Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Checksum mismatch in fetched data.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03116Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for the reorganization to complete before continuing..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03116Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if there is an attempt to update a file marked as physically reorganizing..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03116Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database file is locked for reorganization.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03120Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Investigate the steps that lead to this mismatch and take corrective action, if possible. If corrective action is not possible, a restore to a database that is known to be in a self-consistent state will be necessary..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03120Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a database request attempts to access a file by a number that is not defined in the database control file. It means that a database file is defined in the schema but not in the database control file, so a mismatch normally occurs only as a result of an operational error where the ability to detect this mismatch via timestamp checking has been subverted by using the JOOB Database utility reset timestamp operation, or similar. (See “Resetting Timestamps”, in Chapter 3 of your JOOB Databas [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03120Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The database file is not defined in the control file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03121Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Database administration or backup applications should handle this error with an appropriate exception handler tailored to site requirements. The JOOB sample backup application in RootSchema reports all files that are defined but not yet created at the end of the backup process..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03121Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is raised by database file operations such as the DbFile class backupFile method when the database file has been deleted or it is defined but not yet created. An exception with this error code is of concern only if the file was previously created and is expected to exist..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03121Text

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03130Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Restore the journal from backup and retry recovery. If no backup of the journal is available, the database must be restored from backup and a roll-forward recovery performed through journals specifying termination at a point-in-time that precedes the corrupt record. The journal saved with the .bad extension should be submitted to JOOB Support with an incident report for analysis..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03130Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when recovery has encountered a corrupt journal record header synchronization field and cannot proceed. A copy of the journal file appended with the .bad extension is automatically made and the recovery action is abandoned..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03135Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If this error results in a failure in database recovery, the database must be restored from backup. If the problem occurred during a system crash recovery, it may still be possible to perform an archival recovery by using the last backup and recovering through the transaction journals up to the point where the journals become invalid. If your JOOB licenses include support and you require assistance, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03135Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This is an internal error used by the database journal read logic to signify that an audit record followed by a region of nulls was read. This is a benign condition when the record is contained in the last block of the current journal. If this error is reported during an operation such as roll-forward recovery, it means that a null region was detected in a journal block other than the final block and the operation is terminated at that point..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03135Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Null Audit header exception.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03137Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The errors can provide useful diagnostic information if the DisableAutoReindex parameter is set to true, which prevents the automatic reindexing..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03137Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This is an internal error returned when redoing a block operation during recovery or transaction abort. If the DisableAutoReindex parameter in the [PersistentDb] section of your JOOB initialization file is set to the default value of false and the error is encountered in restart recovery, these errors trigger post-recovery reindexing on the affected files. If the DisableAutoReindex parameter is set to true, the recovery operation subsequently fails with a 3113 error (Database recovery not possible - fa [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03137Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error encountered Redoing a BTree operation.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03138Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This is an internal error returned when undoing a block operation during recovery or transaction abort. If the DisableAutoReindex parameter in the [PersistentDb] section of your JOOB initialization file is set to the default value of false and the error is encountered in restart recovery, these errors trigger post recovery reindexing on the affected files. If the DisableAutoReindex parameter is set to true, the recovery operation subsequently fails with a 3113 error (Database recovery not possible - fa [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03138Text

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when the database receives a file operation request that cannot be performed because the database is in backup state; that is, an online backup is in progress. Operations that can raise this exception include file or partition removal, moving a partition, marking a partition as absent, and changing the location of a partition..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03158Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when execution of a partition method encounters an unhandled exception. This error can be returned when an application implementation of the autoPartitionIndex method is invoked during the processing of the commit and execution of the method encounters an exception. In this case execution of the commitTransaction instruction encounters the exception. The error can also occur during execution of the MakePartitioned command, in which case, the operation is terminated..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03158Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Partition method execution failed: refer to server jommsg.log.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03159Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error can occur if an application process attempts to refer to an object (using its OID) and the object is not visible to the referencing process; for example, the transaction that created the object could have aborted or has not been committed. Note The process that creates an object can always access the object even if it overflows node cache and has not been assigned a partition..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03159Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an object is referenced and its partition cannot be determined by consulting the partition index..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03159Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Partition not assigned.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03160Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This exception can occur when an exclusive instance of JoobBytes is populated in the same transaction that created the owner object and the partition index has not been explicitly set. There are two solutions: Create the parent and populate the JoobBytes property in separate transactions Call setPartitionIndex to assign a partition to the parent before populating the JoobBytes property.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03160Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an exclusive singleFile instance of JoobBytes is sent to the database engine and the partition of its owner has not been assigned..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If this error is detected, logged, and a retry of the send and replay succeeds, no further action is required. If multiple journal send and replay operations fail, check the disposition of the original journal on the primary and check and correct the integrity of the network link..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03200Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is detected and reported by the Synchronized Database Service (SDS) tracker module while replaying a journal, if it determines that the journal it is replaying is somehow incomplete. When this error is detected, it is recorded in the JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file and SDS log file, and the secondary tracker requests a re-send from the primary database and replays the journal once it is received. If three attempts to receive and replay a specific journal fail in sequence, this is conside [rest of string was truncated]";.

This may require performing a hostile takeover..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03209Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a negotiated or hostile takeover fails for any reason. member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03209Text

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This is an internal error that is returned to the SDS secondary database to halt tracking at the version upgrade boundary when a version mismatch exists. SDS: Secondary upgrade version mismatch: tracking will now halt SDS: Upgrade to the same software release level as the primary and restart server.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SDS Upgrade version mismatch.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when: A secondary database attempts to connect with an SDS primary database using the same name as another secondary database that is already connected. Two or more secondary databases are configured with the same name specified in the MyName parameter in the [SyncDbService] section of the JOOB initialization file. A secondary database disconnects from a primary database (for example, due to a temporary network error) and then attempts to reconnect before the primary d [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to As un-versioning is not possible, your only course of action is to carry out the reorganization or to restore your system from backup..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03415Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Dependencies among schemas (based on a variety of conditions) determine whether un-versioning is allowed. If a superschema is versioned and the latest version of the superschema was created before the schema was processed, un-versioning is not possible and this error occurs. For example, if a schema is added to a schema that has already been versioned, the versioned schema cannot be unversioned..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03415Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Schema cannot be unversioned, dependent schemas exist.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Start the reorganization when the compile has completed..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03501Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ensure that the parameters in your JOOB initialization file are correct. In particular, check that the transport-type value is correctly specified in the ServerNodeSpecifications parameter in the [Client] section of the JOOB initialization file and that it is spelled correctly. A common mistake is the misspelling of TcpIp. If your JOOB initialization file is correct and your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a JOOB Remote Procedure Call (RPC) version mismatch is detected between the JOOB client and the JOOB server after a connection has been established. The most likely cause is that the JOOB system libraries have been upgraded on either the client or the server only..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a management request directed to another client node attempts to return a result of more than 50,000 bytes..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to None..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03518Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if a management request directed to another node could not be successfully processed. The JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file for one of the three nodes (source, target, or database) may contain additional details. A common cause for this error is that the target node is terminating..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03518Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Remote management request failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03519Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Make more memory available to the server or change the application to send several smaller requests..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03519Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt was made to send a large request to the server (for example, executing a serverExecution method with a very large String or Binary parameter) and the server could not allocate a single contiguous piece of memory in which to receive the request..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03519Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Large request buffer allocation failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03520Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to None..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03520Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an intra-process request directed to a remote node could not be successfully processed. The JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file for one of the three nodes (source, target, or database) may contain additional details. A common cause for this error is that the target node is terminating..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P03520Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Remote intra process request failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05001Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine the root cause of this error from your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file, specifically the description reported by the operating system..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05001Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the file open operation was denied by the operating system for a reason other than an access violation..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05001Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot open file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05002Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Provide an appropriate exception handler to shield users from this error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05002Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the file is not accessible with the selected mode and sharing attributes. This usually indicates that another process on the same workstation, or elsewhere in the network, already has the file open with an incompatible sharing mode..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05002Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Requested access to file not permitted.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05003Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Provide an appropriate exception handler to shield users from this error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05003Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt to open a file with a mode of File.Mode_Input or File.Mode_IO fails to locate the file and the allowCreate attribute of the FileNode class is set to false..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05003Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Requested file not found.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05004Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Use a disk verification utility to verify the file or the device containing the file (or both)..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05004Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the file read operation is incomplete. A file read operation failed to transfer the requested amount of data from the physical disk file. This error will not occur when a sequential read reaches or attempts to read beyond the end of file, which sets the file status to end-of-file. The error is therefore an indication that the file has been corrupted or a hardware error occurred on the device containing the file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05004Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to File read operation incomplete.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05005Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Correct the problem of insufficient disk space, or if this is not the problem, check for a hardware failure..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05005Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when a file writeBinary, writeLine, or writeString operation fails to transfer all of the requested data to the physical disk file. The most common cause of this error is an “out of disk space” situation. However, physical hardware failures could also cause the same error condition..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05005Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to File write operation incomplete.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05006Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05006Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is an internal error and may indicate that there is a corruption of the file information block used by JOOB..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05006Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot set file pointer.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05007Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your application code to ensure that files are opened before any access calls..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05007Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if JOOB attempts to access a file that is not currently open..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05007Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Required file is not currently open.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05008Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Determine if the existing file is still required. If it is required, move, rename, or back up and remove the file, and then repeat the operation. If it is not required, remove the file and repeat the operation. Alternatively, provide an appropriate exception handler to shield users from this error..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05008Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt is made to overwrite an existing file when opening a file with a mode set to File.Mode_Output and the allowReplace attribute of the File class is set to false. The allowReplace attribute is intended to prevent the accidental overwriting of existing files..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05008Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot overwrite existing file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05009Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your application code so that it does not attempt to read past the end of the file. Do this by checking for end-of-file before reading and by ensuring that you do not attempt to read records larger than the difference between the length of the file and the current file offset..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05009Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if there is an attempt to read beyond the end of a file. If the file was at the end before the read, no data will have been read. If the file was not at the end before the read, data up to the end of the file will have been read..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05009Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot read past the end of file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05010Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your application code to avoid these conflicts. The method and source position containing the file operation at which the exception was raised are reported in the error description..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05010Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when a file operation conflicts with the current mode of the file; for example, if an attempt is made to write to a file opened with the mode set to File.Mode_Input or to read from a file opened with the mode set to File.Mode_Output..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05010Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Read/write operation conflicts with file mode.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05011Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Increase the value of the maxRecordSize property of the File object..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05011Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when a readLine operation is performed and the line read is found to be larger than the maxRecordSize property that was set when the file was opened. The line is truncated to the size specified by the maxRecordSize property..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05011Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Record truncated to maxRecordSize characters.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05012Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If your JOOB licenses include support, contact your local JOOB support center or JOOB Support..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs during the conversion of data from Unicode to ANSI. This error can occur when reading a Unicode text file into an ANSI JOOB application or when writing an ANSI file from a Unicode JOOB application..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05012Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unicode to Ansi conversion failed.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs during the conversion of data from ANSI to Unicode. This error can occur when reading an ANSI text file into a Unicode JOOB application or when writing a Unicode file from an ANSI JOOB application..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05013Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ansi to Unicode conversion failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05014Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your application code so that files are not renamed to different devices..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05014Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if there is an attempt to rename a file to a different device. Files are renamed only to the same device. For example, this error occurs if you attempt to rename c:\myfile.txt to a:\newfile.txt. You cannot rename myfile.txt from the c: drive to the a: drive..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05014Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot rename a file to a different device.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05015Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file where the operating system error is written. This can be useful in determining exactly why the rename operation failed..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05015Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt to rename a file failed. The most common reasons for a rename failure are: The path or file name was not found. Access to the file was denied. You attempted to rename the file to a different device. This error occurs if a rename attempt failed for a reason other than these..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05015Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to rename a file failed.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file where the operating system error is written. This can be useful in determining exactly why the delete operation failed..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt to delete a file failed. member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05016Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to delete a file failed.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if your application code attempts to open a file containing an odd number of bytes as Unicode. As all Unicode characters occupy two bytes, a file containing an odd number of bytes cannot be a Unicode file..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if an attempt to remove a directory fails. The most common reasons for a delete directory failure are: The path or directory name is not found Access to the file is denied This error occurs if the directory operation fails for a reason other than these..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05029Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if you have specified a file or directory name that is not supported by the file system hosting the file. For example, on UNIX systems, file names can contain : or \ characters, but on Windows systems, these characters are reserved and have special meanings..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05029Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to File name not valid for file system.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05030Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to File is in use by another process.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05031Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Obtain sufficient disk space for the file to grow and then resubmit the failed operation..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to A file write encountered an out of disk condition.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file for a description of the error reported and then take any appropriate action..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if the operating system encounters an error when closing a file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05032Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error encountered closing file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05033Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file for a description of the error reported and then take any appropriate action..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05033Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error is raised by the operating system on finding an error on the last read or write operation of a file. This can occur for several reasons, including a hardware device error, file corruption, security issue, or software problem..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05033Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An unexpected I/O error occurred accessing file.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05034Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check that your program has sufficient security rights to read the input file and has sufficient security for writing the output file. In addition, check that there is sufficient space for the data required on the output file. If these actions do not resolve the problem, refer to your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file for a description of the error reported and take any appropriate action..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05034Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an attempt to copy a file fails. This can occur for several reasons, including a hardware device error, file corruption, security issue, or software problem..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05034Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Attempt to copy a file failed.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05035Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Change your code to ensure that when file objects are employed on different nodes, the file is opened on the same node that performs file I/O operations..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05035Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an attempt is made to access a file on a different node to the one that opened the file; for example, when a file is opened on a client node and a server method attempts to read or write to the file, this error is raised..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05035Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot access a file opened by a different Node.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05036Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check the kind property against the actual kind of the file. Specify the actual file kind, or use a more generic kind such as Kind_Unicode or Kind_Unknown_Text, as appropriate..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05036Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an attempt is made to open a file where the kind property of the File class has been set to a value such as Kind_Unicode_UTF16LE and the actual Byte Order Mark (BOM) header of the file does not match the requested kind..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05036Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot open file, the kind property is different to actual file kind.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05038Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Check the validity of the file. This error may indicate a corrupted file. Use a non-JOOB tool to find and correct the illegal UTF-8 character sequence..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05038Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when the input Unicode file in UTF-8 format does not contain characters that are legal UTF-8 characters. This is most likely caused by specifying a file kind of Kind_Unicode_UTF8, when the actual file is not a true UTF-8 format file..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05038Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unicode UTF8 file contains illegal byte sequence.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05039Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Convert the schema file into a standard format supported by JOOB (that is, either ANSI or Unicode UTF-16) and then reload the schema..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05039Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when an attempt is made to load a schema (.scm) or forms definition (.ddb) file in Unicode UTF-8 format. JOOB .scm and .ddb files must be in either ANSI or Unicode UTF-16 format..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05039Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unicode UTF8 file kind not supported.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05040Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Refer to your JOOB messages (jommsg.log) log file for the value of the operating system error code. It is possible that the system is under-configured for the applied workload. If you consider the operating environment to be sound with adequate memory resources, refer the problem to your operating system vendor, as there may be a resolution available in a service pack. There have been instances where operating system bugs have caused such errors..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05040Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error can be raised by JOOB file classes if the operating system refuses to service a file system request due to constrained resources. See also, error 3111 – Insufficient system resources..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05040Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Insufficient system resources.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05045Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Use exception handling to cater for the possibility that a symbolic link file could be broken..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05045Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs on UNIX systems when the open method of the File class is executed on a broken symbolic link (symlink) file; a broken or orphan symbolic link is one that refers to a file that no longer exists. Note Symbolic link files, whether valid or broken, are contained in the array of files returned by the files method of the FileFolder class..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05045Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Broken symbolic link.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05707Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when converting string data between heterogeneous environments (or between ANSI and Unicode formats during a database conversion) and the size of the string has become smaller. This can occur when multi-byte sequences are translated to a single Unicode character or when Unicode surrogates are encountered..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05707Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Jom DataInterchange String size decreased.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05708Action
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Increase the maximum size of the fixed length string property or decrease the amount of data stored in the fixed length string property..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05708Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs when converting string data between heterogeneous environments (or between ANSI and Unicode formats during a database conversion) and the size of the string has become too large to fit inside the fixed-length string. This can occur when a Unicode character is translated to multi-byte sequence during a database conversion from Unicode to ANSI or when Unicode surrogates are encountered across heterogeneous environments..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05708Text
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Jom DataInterchange String buffer too small.

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P05710Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This is an internal error in which a character is not valid within the current codepage and there has been a NULL (0 byte) character before the invalid character. If the string is a fixed-length property, this is not an error. However, if the string is variable-length (that is, a slob), the error is converted to a 5706 error because NULL characters are allowed in slobs, whereas in fixed-length string properties, a NULL terminates the string..

member.name: P:JadeSoftware.Joob.Exceptions.Resources.Jom_P35021Cause
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This error occurs if Inter Node Communications (INC) network access is denied, due to the value of the RestrictedHostAccess parameter specified in the [ConnectionParams.<name>] section of the JOOB initialization file for a primary server. When this parameter is set to true, the primary server will refuse connections from any host that is not included in the AllowedHost list..

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Metadata.JomlTypeAttribute
member.summary:
Attribute indicates that the type is a JOML definition using attributes of the form [JomlType(JomlTypeKind...., NameOfType, superType, ...extra information)]
[JomlType(JomlTypeKind.Primitive, "Binary", typeof(object))] [JomlType(JomlTypeKind.PrimitiveCollection, "BinaryArray", typeof(JoobArray), MembershipType=typeof(JoobBinary))] [JomlType(JomlTypeKind.Class, "Customer", typeof(JoobObject))] [JomlType(JomlTypeKind.ClassCollection, "CustomerDict", typeof(MemberKeyDictionary), MembershipType=typeof(Customer), Keys="name")]

member.name: T:JadeSoftware.Joob.Point
member.summary:
A JOOB Point type is used to represent a point in two-dimensional space. A Point primitive type encapsulates two integer values: the x (horizontal) and y (vertical) coordinates.
You can use the Point primitive type to represent any other two-dimensional data; for example, points on a graph.
